Registry / Terms / transducer

transducer

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #02303-R085-1 · 4 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 3 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
20102008OIML R 85-1:2008
#02303
3.5
device that provides an output quantity, having a determined relationship to the input quantity
pending
20102007OIML R 117-1:2007
#01602
T.t.1
part of the measuring device that provides an output signal, representing volume or mass, having a determined relationship to the input signal. The transducer can either be incorporated with the meter sensor or beexternal to the meter sensor. In the latter case, it can be approved either with the sensor or with the calculator.
pending
202X2008OIML R 85-1:2008
#02303-R085-1
3.5
device that provides an output quantity, having a determined relationship to the input quantity
pending
202X2007OIML R 117-1:2007
#03578
T.t.1
part of the measuring device that provides an output signal, representing volume or mass, having a determined relationship to the input signal (See also T.a.8)
pending
